name: Steve Chabot
subject: Did you see?
body:
Did you see my latest op-ed in the Cincinnati Enquirer?
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,Did you see my latest op-ed in the [Cincinnati Enquirer](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-y/)?I call on Republicans and Democrats to put politics aside, now that the election is over, and come together to solve problems. We should start by providing additional Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) relief for our small businesses and their workers - many of whom are still struggling to survive the pandemic.I also make an announcement that I wanted you to see: [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-j/) I'll never stop fighting for our communities, especially in these challenging times.[**Your support was critical to our success in the recent election. Can I count on you to stand with me again?**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-t/) [STAND WITH STEVE CHABOT](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-i/) Your support and your confidence allows me to continue delivering results for the people of the First District.Thank you and God Bless,Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-k/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-o/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-b/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-judrhdkl-l-n)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-judrhdkl-961825B2-kujkulhluu-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-judrhdkl-kujkulhluu-x/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20Georgia?=
subject: FWD: Giving Tuesday
body:
We Simply Can't Do This Without You | | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8069d056a0&e=3f151f8b74 "DONATE")
---
| | | [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a04d923c75&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Why Do We Need Moms in Office? Nikema Williams, Congresswoman Elect GA -05
|
---
| Friends,

I am writing to make sure you have received this email below about our efforts to flip Georgia blue. Moms for Georgia already raised $4,000 thanks to amazing supporters like you. We are closing in on our GIVING TUESDAY goal with just a few hours left and we still need to raise another $1,000 to reach our goal of $5,000.

Here is the good news; if we do, a generous donor offered to match our donations today! This would mean so much to us, can you [help us ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=bd174783ac&e=3f151f8b74)reach our goal?
Why is this so important not just for working moms fighting for paid leave, universal preschool, and access to healthcare, but for all Americans who need to build back their lives after one of the most devastating economic downturns in our country's history? Because the outcome of the runoff on January 5th, two weeks before President-elect Joe Biden's inauguration, could swing the majority to Democrats, handing the new president broad power to carry out his policy agenda. We simply can't let Republicans continue to stand in the way of progress and change for working families in America. Will you stand with Moms in Office to help us flip Georgia blue? [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=dd2017ef28&e=3f151f8b74)today because single moms like me and working families in America count on us to help Joe Biden lead our country out of this recession. He can't do it without the Senate and he can't do it without you and me.

Sincerely,

Simona Grace

Founder, Moms in Office
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: We Must Hold The Line In Georgia
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-v/) December 1, 2020 **We Must #HoldTheLine** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-r/) In order to preserve our conservative Tennessee values, we must protect the Republican Senate Majority. Right now, Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue in Georgia need the good people of Tennessee to volunteer or donate to stop socialist radicals like Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff from implementing their extreme agenda which includes defunding the police, enacting the Green New Deal and packing the courts. There are several ways that you can help.**[Donate To Protect The Majority!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-y/)**[**Volunteer To Protect The Majority!**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-j/)**[Follow Senator Kelly Loeffler!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-t/)****[Follow Senator David Perdue!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-i/)** **Support President Trump** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-d/) President Donald Trump and his team are working to ensure a fair and transparent election for the American people. It is important that every legal vote is counted, while any illegally submitted votes are not. We must protect the sanctity of the ballot box and support President Trump in investigating the irregularities of the 2020 election.You can join Bill in contributing to the president's legal defense fund **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-h/)** **ICYMI: Hagerty On Breitbart News** It is past time that the American people wake up to the threat of the Communist Chinese regime. Because of their misinformation campaign and attempt to cover up valuable data about the COVID-19 pandemic, the world is suffering from not only a health care crisis but a financial crisis as well. It is time to strengthen and fortify our supply chains, reduce our dependency on Communist China and hold them accountable for the impact of this pandemic.You can listen to the full interview [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Support Small Business** The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted just how critical our small businesses are. They are the backbone of our economy and are a source of good jobs for Tennesseans across the state. Last weekend, the country celebrated Small Business Saturday to support our local small business community. We're taking this to the next level and inviting you to join us in making Small Business Saturday every Saturday. Our small businesses need our help and it's time we get out and support them.
## **Press Highlights**
**[The Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-u/) Blackburn, Hagerty Endorse Ronna McDaniel's Continuation As RNC Chairwoman****[Washington Examiner:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-o/) Incoming senator questions 'validity' of Section 230 tech censorship protection law****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-b/) Blackburn, Hagerty Represent Tennessee in 50-State Effort to Support Georgia Runoff Candidates and Preserve Republican Control of Senate****[AP:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-m/) Republican Hagerty wins open Tennessee Senate seat** | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-c/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-q/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-a/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-f/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xhtekd-fuutjhhtj-z/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Videos from poll watchers about the corruption they witnessed
body:
So many of you have asked how you can help President Trump in Georgia and the other states where his team is pursuing accountability in light of the election fraud that has surfaced. Right now, the biggest thing you can do to help President Trump and help America is watch, post, and share the videos linked below my signature. We need to get as many eyes on these testimonials from poll watchers and others in Georgia who experienced the corruption first-hand. While his legal team is focusing on the lawsuits they are filing, we the people need to do our part to get the truth out. Watch the videos, and if you have any social media accounts, share the videos on your accounts. If you do not have social media accounts, forward this email to people that need to see these videos. They are all short and under ten minutes in length, with most being around three to four minutes long. In addition to these first-person testimonials, please also watch and share the election hearings from Pennsylvania and Arizona.
* [Pennsylvania Hearing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1EU0Raa1h4RlZFVSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=TPzEqoXhIJNylkvKrUwJ5w)
* [Arizona Hearing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1ycmk2Zmx4YVh3dyZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qT33hA3ruQuziGdZOhxe2A)

The reason we must amplify all of these videos, including the hearing videos, is because time is running out, and the media and Big Tech have been working overtime to convince the American people that there was absolutely no fraud whatsoever. We must show our fellow Americans that there are people willing to put their names and faces out there to tell the truth about what happened. [You can also read about the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qZW5ueWJldGhtL3N0YXR1cy8xMzMzNTg0Mzc3MTUwOTAyMjc4P3M9MjAmbWlkPTQzMDY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=lDIS8hTPhmUUvXRITk7MMg) that the Trump campaign sent to the Georgia Secretary of State on Monday, to help you understand what is going on in Georgia. Finally, if you live in Georgia, please consider calling Governor Kemp’s office to urge him to instruct an audit of the ballot signatures, as he has the power to do this via the state’s constitution. He doesn’t need the Secretary of State to get this done. His number is (404) 656-1776. Please help get the word out about these videos – I cannot emphasize the importance of amplifying their voices enough right now, but it’s hugely important. Thank you, and keep fighting!
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin VIDEOS **Nancy Kain** volunteered as poll watcher for the GOP for advance voting, Election Day, and counting the absentee ballots after Nov. 3rd. She volunteered on Nov. 5th at both State Farm Arena in Fulton County and in DeKalb County. Nancy saw multiple irregularities at both locations, including a poll worker entering votes into a voting machine, poll watchers like herself forced to stand very far away and unable to actually monitor, people working with the ballots without official badges, and more. Nancy’s video includes photos and video from that day. **Nancy’s Video:**
* [Nancy Kain - Witnessed Irregularities](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1tdUFpVWpSbTRXUSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=A6XAPamfzg6RZEH2ZRHUIQ)

| |
---
Bridget Thorne is a temporary technician certified by DOMINION to test the voting machines before and during the general election at the Fulton Country “warehouse” facility. Bridget witnessed mismanagement of 1000’s printed voting machine test ballots by DOMINION employees. (Test ballots are indistinguishable from real ballots, and can be tabulated should they be mixed in.) Also, after early voting over 50 scanners loaded with ballots were rolled in from the nearby voting precinct. She was shocked to see there was no care to properly secure the transfer of ballots from scanners to holding bags. Later she found stacks of printed ballots abandoned in an open scanner/tabulator, unsupervised in the evening, accessible to anyone.

**Bridget’s Videos:**
* [Bridget's protests of unsecure ballot collection rebuked by Dominion manager.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1aeXpNTXlpcnJrNCZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=X3zOdzTPUFYvLPvd7AHMog)
* [Georgia voting tech concerned test ballot disposal not secure](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1LZkNJRWJaNURGOCZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Tmvo080KVf2ZYAjT-JQzLQ)
* [Dominion employees in Georgia caught printing random ballots!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1LN1pQdENyMHo5SSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=icih9y9pOM0v7cqFClklAQ)
* [Dominion printed 1000's of test ballots indistinguishable from real ballots in Georgia.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1XRTJkTkhlNDRCYyZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=GSi9eLNxbxZczk5sQ0fRZQ)
* [Bridget Thorne - ACLU Poll Clerks](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj0zTG0yYVRhMUlFdyZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=vZigBh8RT1mSMZooL9sDpA)

|
---
**Debraleigh Brown** , a Fulton Co resident was 1st in line at her polling site on Election Day and wastold the Dominion poll equipment was “down” because of a missing key. She was given a partial provisional ballot in lieu of the full ballot. Problems at the precinct went unrepaired for 3hrs, and the manager told her he didn’t know how to verify that her provisional ballot would eventually be counted.

**Debraleigh’s Video:**
* [Dominion equipment not working on Election Day. Voter has "complete doubt" in voting integrity.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1RdFYzWmp6UkUySSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=eQcTVG-acmC4eAfytD3UJQ)

|
---
**Dana Smith** of Hartwell Georgia trained to be a poll watcher because she loves her country. She is shocked to discover election officials cutting corners and refusing to secure paper ballots at the end of the night. When the paper ballots are brought in during the recount, she sees they are no longer in the canvas bag they were put in on election night; they’ve been removed and placed neatly in stacks in cardboard boxes that are not labeled and there is no paperwork.

**Dana’s Videos:**
* [Ballot chain of custody security protocols Ignored.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj0tb0hlOWlVWXM0WSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ALIfNcWg-dw7Wa8t8Ih7Tg)
* [Witness: Absentee Ballot Signature verification not secure!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj01Qm5NTlRXMk15USZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_HzxnHVMxA3fJ_IoF0OQVQ)

|
---
**Collete Devine** was a GOP poll watcher in Cherokee County as absentee ballots were pulled from envelopes. She was placed so far away from the process that she could not see nor hear what was happening. Staff made it clear she was not welcome.

**Collete’s Video:**
* [Georgia Poll Monitor put too far away to see Absentee Ballot Processing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1YYVktRU9GN0VPWSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JZUXG5cEtBPlYYeqxW1j8w)

|
---
**Jane Levings** was trained to be a GOP poll monitor for absentee ballot processing at State Farm arena in Fulton County, GA. The “monitor” designation allowed her movement about the room to view things up close. However, unhelpful Fulton County election staff segregated Jane away into a corner of the large hall, where she couldn’t see or hear any details of the processing of absentee ballots. Meanwhile, monitors from National Public Radio and a George Soros associated group, “Vote at Home Institute,” were allowed to freely roam the room, see up close, and speak freely with workers.

**Jane’s Video:**
* [Soros-linked poll monitors allowed to roam free, but GOP volunteers segregated to a distant corner.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1UaEUxbW9yTWd6ayZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mF8o9PjfELeveFmDXfxiwQ)

|
---
**Sandy Metts** monitored the ballot recount in Clarke County, GA. She explains how the chain of custody for ballots from the polling place to the recount room is critical to an accurate audit and recount. However, what she observed in person at the recount was far from secure. In fact, when the number of ballots to be recounted fell short of the Nov 3rd totals, ballots were “brought out from the back room” to make up the difference.

**Sandy’s Video:**
* [When ballot recount comes up short, ballots conveniently emerge to make up the difference.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1oUDYySFdIMi1yVSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=U0ou-QbuexjkgvNdevJFtQ)

|
---
**Charlice Byrd** was a GOP poll monitor for the recount in Fulton County, GA. She was shocked at the rude treatment of GOP monitors by Fulton county election supervisors. Also, she was forced to stand far away from the process that she was there to monitor. A fellow GOP monitor was directed by a supervisor to delete photos of the process from her phone.

**Charlice’s Video:**
* [GOP poll monitors forced to delete photos from phone by rude supervisor.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1PVkp1SjE4SDNVMCZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nmdnk8ZbsD3N_oIPUiHRDQ)

|
---
**Leroy Emkin** was a poll monitor in Cobb County, Georgia during the recount. He was surprised to discover that no real audit was taking place, despite the promises from state officials. Also, nearby electronic tabulation machines sat idle, unutilized in verifying the hand count. And, like other monitors, he was repeatedly told to move farther away from the people counting ballots.

**Leroy’s Video:**
* [Georgia: Available scanners NOT utilized to audit ballot count.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1jN3RvanFKZ3lsUSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=fhXc61ObmAdixJCFS60D8w)

|
---
**Jeremy Merritt** was a victim of absentee ballot and voter fraud, at his own rural precinct when he discovers someone walked in earlier on Nov 3rd posing as Jeremy with an absentee ballot...and was allowed to vote! In the afternoon, when Jeremy arrives to vote and is told he already voted, a poll manager tried to “make good” by urging him to vote in place of his Father. Jeremy refused. Jeremy calls his father from the precinct, and discovers he also experienced absentee problems during early voting and his vote was not recorded in the poll pad system.

**Jeremy’s Video:**
* [Absentee ballot fraud victim](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9nM2RJeXRRYTA2Yz9taWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZRD0D6WCgR3eaVCgA6zXow)

|
---
**Laura Jones** went through 4 hours of training to be a poll worker in Fulton Country. The focus of the training was “Secure The Vote.” However, everything she experienced on election day shook her faith in the mission; from mismatched serial numbers on polling equipment to open, unsecured USB ports on the large voter touch screen computers.

**Laura’s Video:**
* [Georgia poll worker: Dominion touch screens arrived with USB port doors open and unsecured.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1iRnphYzNrd0xMOCZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=BZe4iEnUNK7FCXNgWwKZdg)

|
---
**Susan Knox** volunteered as a poll watcher in Cobb County, GA, and found what seemed to be a deliberate attempt by ballot counters and supervisors to keep her from seeing ballots and watching them record vote totals. Ballot counters went so far as to use one hand to cover what they were writing with the other hand. She was obviously unwelcome and hampered at every turn as she tried to ensure integrity and transparency.

**Susan’s Video:**
* [Susan Knox - Poll Watcher](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTk%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj11aGNyOXN4eUZRcyZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=aWJMvD57yKZBceYuHs-jfw)

|
---
**Pam Peters** was a poll watcher in Floyd Co. She kept hourly notes on number of votes in the scanner/tabulator up to closing time but was not allowed to witness the securing of ballots at closing. At recount, six additional ballots appeared for that precinct.

**Pam’s Video:**

* [Surprise additional ballots at recount](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS81cFRxeFdoekIzMD9taWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=efRsncLoSKPlcGHSopn1Xw)

|
---
**Brad Hebebrand** is a Georgia voter. He voted on election day. But, when the Dominion scanner jammed while reading his printed ballot, it left him doubting the security of his vote.

**Brad’s Video:**
* [Voter says Dominion scanner jammed at polling place, leaving him doubting security of his ballot.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1veEF2NXJNcnNjYyZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=pY5YWIlTVZAH2dqOdg1M7A)

|
---
**Bill Blane** volunteered as a poll watcher in Fulton County, GA. He also, like many other watchers, was forced to stay so far from the people counting ballots that it was useless, and did not allow for any supervision of accuracy or integrity. A poll worker refused to answer questions from another poll watcher about why they could not move closer and what exactly was the protocol that the ballot counters were supposed to be following.

**Bill’s Video:**
* [GA Absentee Ballot Processing: "I was 50' away! No permission to visualize what was going on!"](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj05Q1lPYXdVckI0VSZtaWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=fqEehGlCR8vVJ7iFr9cW3g)

[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDMwNjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=8gD2GMCl2eNQ3yeBldNdWw)
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM3LTRlNjE3OWQ0NmY5YTRjMDFiODJhZjdlMjc3YmJiMTE1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmc_bWlkPTQzMDY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=6snAveNuUY51xfzs-5k0yQ)

clean_body: So many of you have asked how you can help President Trump in Georgia and the other states where his team is pursuing accountability in light of the election fraud that has surfaced. Right now, the biggest thing you can do to help President Trump and help America is watch, post, and share the videos linked below my signature. We need to get as many eyes on these testimonials from poll watchers and others in Georgia who experienced the corruption first-hand. While his legal team is focusing on the lawsuits they are filing, we the people need to do our part to get the truth out. Watch the videos, and if you have any social media accounts, share the videos on your accounts. If you do not have social media accounts, forward this email to people that need to see these videos. They are all short and under ten minutes in length, with most being around three to four minutes long. In addition to these first-person testimonials, please also watch and share the election hearings from Pennsylvania and Arizona. The reason we must amplify all of these videos, including the hearing videos, is because time is running out, and the media and Big Tech have been working overtime to convince the American people that there was absolutely no fraud whatsoever. We must show our fellow Americans that there are people willing to put their names and faces out there to tell the truth about what happened. that the Trump campaign sent to the Georgia Secretary of State on Monday, to help you understand what is going on in Georgia. Finally, if you live in Georgia, please consider calling Governor Kemp’s office to urge him to instruct an audit of the ballot signatures, as he has the power to do this via the state’s constitution. He doesn’t need the Secretary of State to get this done. His number is (404) 656-1776. Please help get the word out about these videos – I cannot emphasize the importance of amplifying their voices enough right now, but it’s hugely important. Thank you, and keep fighting! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin VIDEOS Nancy Kain volunteered as poll watcher for the GOP for advance voting, Election Day, and counting the absentee ballots after Nov. 3rd. She volunteered on Nov. 5th at both State Farm Arena in Fulton County and in DeKalb County. Nancy saw multiple irregularities at both locations, including a poll worker entering votes into a voting machine, poll watchers like herself forced to stand very far away and unable to actually monitor, people working with the ballots without official badges, and more. Nancy’s video includes photos and video from that day. (Test ballots are indistinguishable from real ballots, and can be tabulated should they be mixed in.) Also, after early voting over 50 scanners loaded with ballots were rolled in from the nearby voting precinct. She was shocked to see there was no care to properly secure the transfer of ballots from scanners to holding bags. Later she found stacks of printed ballots abandoned in an open scanner/tabulator, unsupervised in the evening, accessible to anyone. Bridget’s Videos: | Debraleigh Brown , a Fulton Co resident was 1st in line at her polling site on Election Day and wastold the Dominion poll equipment was “down” because of a missing key. She was given a partial provisional ballot in lieu of the full ballot. Problems at the precinct went unrepaired for 3hrs, and the manager told her he didn’t know how to verify that her provisional ballot would eventually be counted. Debraleigh’s Video: | Dana Smith of Hartwell Georgia trained to be a poll watcher because she loves her country. She is shocked to discover election officials cutting corners and refusing to secure paper ballots at the end of the night. When the paper ballots are brought in during the recount, she sees they are no longer in the canvas bag they were put in on election night; they’ve been removed and placed neatly in stacks in cardboard boxes that are not labeled and there is no paperwork. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: The Big Choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
The choice in these two runoff elections is clear.

Fellow American:

The outcome of the two runoff elections in Georgia
will determine control of the U.S. Senate and possibly whether
there is any check at all to slow the Democrats' push for
socialism in America.

The choice in these two runoff elections is clear.

Consider the radical positions held by the
Democrats:

❌ Jon Ossoff (D-GA) supports repealing President
Trump's tax cuts, cozying up to China, ending the legislative
filibuster, and dismantling the Second Amendment.

❌ Raphael Warnock (D-GA) has attacked law
enforcement, supports trillion-dollar tax increases, defended
anti-Semitic pastor Jeremiah Wright, and praised Communist leader
Fidel Castro.

The views held by these liberals are very dangerous
and cannot be allowed to win six-year terms in the Senate.

Conservatives must work together to push Senators
David Perdue (R-GA) and Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) on to victory.

Please make a contribution to their campaigns today.

SCF pays all processing fees so these candidates can
spend 100% of your donation on voter contact.

Senators Perdue and Loeffler will stand up to the
liberals in Washington and fight to stop higher taxes, wasteful
spending, state bailouts, amnesty for illegal immigrants, and
attacks on our right to keep and bear arms.

But they need your support to overcome the avalanche
of liberal money pouring into the campaigns of their opponents.

Time is running short. Early in-person voting begins
December 14 and the race will be concluded on January 5.

Contribute to David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler now!

The election system in Georgia has serious
vulnerabilities that must be addressed, but failing to fight for
these Senate seats will guarantee defeat and give Chuck Schumer
control of the Senate.

Every freedom-loving American must answer the call
to win these races and create a firewall for freedom in the
Senate.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

EARLY VOTING COUNTDOWN

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

SAVE THE SENATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Jaw Dropping Update (from UNITEDemocrats.org)
subject: re: prediction by Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Trump is furious at Adam Schiff.

| Peter -- Adam Schiff made our jaws hit the floor, but he's 100% right: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/22138358/263373795/-1642087459?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=UD_20201202_EMDF_E1_T0_IN-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0YjhlNDM1LWMxMzQtZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDQzYjJjZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZQFH3fugGzwIQfwkjKLA8WZBlBmiP8pDjkK-91vJBvw=) Trump was fuming about what Adam Schiff said in this interview.

[**_Ever since the Mueller Investigation, Trump has been trying to tear Schiff down, and even demanded that Adam Schiff resign from Congress entirely!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/22138359/263373796/-1642087459?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=UD_20201202_EMDF_E1_T0_IN-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0YjhlNDM1LWMxMzQtZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDQzYjJjZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZQFH3fugGzwIQfwkjKLA8WZBlBmiP8pDjkK-91vJBvw=)

But Peter, there's a very real possibility that Republicans could win the two remaining Senate seats in Georgia.

And if the Republicans win, Trump will get away with all of his crimes!

That's why we're investing everything we've got into supporting Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock in Georgia.

**REMEMBER:** Even now that Trump has lost, his Senate Republicans are fiercely loyal to him. We have to make sure we put Democrats in charge of the Senate.

[**Will you pitch in to help us raise $10,000 to invest immediately in winning the Georgia Senate races? This is our last chance to make sure Democrats flip the Senate. name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NATIONAL FEDERATION OF INDEPENDENT BUSINESSES ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 2, 2020 NATIONAL FEDERATION OF INDEPENDENT BUSINESSES ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler was endorsed by the National Federation of Independent Businesses (NFIB). NFIB joins a [lengthy list](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbP_Lus6c3n3tgFpvjJzksp-RclGNoyeni36ORNE36ANXBFUE5tQ8hNmFQETIvckm5SF1SIwERH2KZXBd2NjvQBGpzN-DFA8VhfhrPKMnrABp-db0fkkqC3HFaSyjbtrpnm5mQMJNnSOCm-qmGWbKGwt-tCc2RWd3EKeM6hMSpI=&c=NafXVpHq-DobyJcZn_1HkNu80sbsyiSNW1c9Ph5PwkqjVeItYQstDA==&ch=5WKZ9wVe4z_g1uf-DhUMl3ZczWeLLucqMfGNkTPEmF5Z4SsDmfH2rQ==) of pro-business, groups who have endorsed Senator Loeffler's candidacy for United States Senate.
"It is a tremendous honor to be endorsed by the National Federation of Independent Businesses - and to be recognized as the only pro-business candidate in my race," said Senator Loeffler. "As a political outsider and conservative businesswoman, I spent my life in the private sector creating jobs, balancing budgets, and delivering opportunities for Georgians to succeed. While my opponent wants to shut down the economy, raise our taxes, and take away private health care, I will continue fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, and the free market principles that lift every American up. I am proud to be a champion for Georgia's business community - and I am proud to be leading the effort to reignite our economy and get our state back to work."
"The small business agenda boils down to what happens in the Georgia runoffs. Based on the records and positions of the incumbents and challengers, it is clear these races make the difference in whether small businesses will face higher taxes, or more regulations," said NFIB Senior National Political Director Sharon Sussin. "Senators Perdue and Loeffler have been reliable champions for small businesses in Congress, and we have no doubt they will continue to support pro-small business issues in the Senate."
To view the full list of Senator Loeffler's endorsements, click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbP_Lus6c3n3tgFpvjJzksp-RclGNoyeni36ORNE36ANXBFUE5tQ8hNmFQETIvckm5SF1SIwERH2KZXBd2NjvQBGpzN-DFA8VhfhrPKMnrABp-db0fkkqC3HFaSyjbtrpnm5mQMJNnSOCm-qmGWbKGwt-tCc2RWd3EKeM6hMSpI=&c=NafXVpHq-DobyJcZn_1HkNu80sbsyiSNW1c9Ph5PwkqjVeItYQstDA==&ch=5WKZ9wVe4z_g1uf-DhUMl3ZczWeLLucqMfGNkTPEmF5Z4SsDmfH2rQ==).
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbP_Lus6c3n3tgFpvjJzksp-RclGNoyeni36ORNE36ANXBFUE5tQ8ug6e9XRhWhXTd3QPrd-0y1M0MVRHB9Jag60nTbNYBQrcD8EZ6RJa0R0XPa0FyfON-Mqy5CDT5Wc0MCgF_VAQf-zWJGM_3KtSHBZg3YeODN9&c=NafXVpHq-DobyJcZn_1HkNu80sbsyiSNW1c9Ph5PwkqjVeItYQstDA==&ch=5WKZ9wVe4z_g1uf-DhUMl3ZczWeLLucqMfGNkTPEmF5Z4SsDmfH2rQ==)

subject: Help Me Root Out Corruption in New Jersey
body:
In New Jersey, there is a corrupt bi-partisan establishment made up of Democrats and Never-Trump Republicans... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/help-me-root-out-corruption-in-new-jersey-qjohgbugtc?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=05028401b3&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend,
The News Media has failed the American People completely. While we wait to see what happens with President Trump, know this: The National polls, all of them, including the few ‘prominent’ ones in New Jersey were 100% wrong. Republicans won EVERY SINGLE toss up congressional seat Nationwide. We did not lose a single State Legislature, we have protected the Senate majority, and it looks like we have given the Democrats the smallest majority in the House of Representatives in decades!
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=987c86327a&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| While most of the national news is very good, there is a big local problem right here in New Jersey. Unlike the rest of the country, New Jersey lost 10 out of 12 congressional seats. What happened? If you listen to the lying dishonest media, they will say some nonsense like minorities don’t like President Trump. That is a lie. Looking at Florida’s numbers prove every single minority demographic and women flocked to vote for President Trump in record numbers. In New Jersey, being the most diverse state in the nation, the very same results are possible but there is a corrupt bi-partisan establishment made up of Democrats and Never-Trump Republicans that stands in the way. These corrupt individuals orchestrated New Jersey's losses to fit the News Media created "anti-Trump narrative" and it is time to throw these corrupt individuals out of New Jersey politics once and for all. I delve into it in my speech below from the #StopTheSteal rally in Bedminster. Listen to it:
---
| [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9db21f4245&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=98e1631f88&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| The unholy alliance between corrupt Never-Trump Republicans (RINO’s) and Democrats that sacrificed our US Senate and Congressional seats must be destroyed. [**I need your help**](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a41d9bc414&e=3e017fab0f) to fix our Election Integrity which has been all but destroyed. I need your help to [_Stop Tyrannical Phil Murphy_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=de2e81976c&e=3e017fab0f), who has bankrupted 31% of New Jersey businesses that will not open after this pandemic. [_I need you help_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=655480068d&e=3e017fab0f) to remove the Corrupt RINO’s that have betrayed Republicans and orchestrated our state-wide losses. [_I need your help_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c2b12db9f9&e=3e017fab0f) to re-open New Jersey. I have been fighting non-stop since 2017 and I am dedicated to ensure the People of New Jersey Win. Also, one more update...[our US Supreme Court Case against Phil Murphy’s unconstitutional election and illegal vote-by-mail scheme](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e18e69ebbd&e=3e017fab0f) has been distributed to all the Justices and we hope to hear good news soon. If we win our US Supreme Court Case, President Trump will win his as well.
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor
New Jersey Deserves Justice
## _For the People_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO HELP NEW JERSEY](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c1ba9a1819&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE TO HELP NEW JERSEY")
---

body:
If Republicans don’t win the Senate runoffs in Georgia, the radical left will have TOTAL control. >>

Hoosier Republican,

Our Senate majority hangs in the balance, and it all comes down to Georgia.

In case you haven’t heard, both of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats are headed for runoffs in January, and if we lose them and the presidency, then we lose the last critical line of defense in Washington against the Democrats and their radical agenda.

Kelly Loeffler is a tried-and-true conservative with a business background. She has been a strong ally to President Trump, and has consistently upheld conservative values while serving in the Senate.

Please donate what you can right now to help Kelly win this CRITICAL race. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have directed millions of dollars to Georgia to try and win this seat. And as Republicans, for the good of our nation this is when it’s most important for Hoosiers to step up and fight back.
CHIP IN FOR KELLY LOEFFLER NOW! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-loeffler-support-120120?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_loeffler_support_120120&mc_cid=81a2969dab&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Here in Indiana, we won across the board. But if Republicans lose the U.S. Senate and the presidency, then key priorities for Indiana – and our nation – are in jeopardy.

You know what’s coming. They have already said they will pack the courts, impose the Green New Deal, implement gun control, and more.

This is our moment to stand for liberty and freedom for all. Please help Kelly Loeffler WIN on January 5th!

Thanks for your support,
Kyle Hupfer

name: Team Durbin
subject: Georgia, Georgia, Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Election Day may be long past for most of us, but voters in Georgia are headed to the polls one more time on January 5 to elect not one, but two new U.S. Senators in a crucial runoff election.
Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock have the momentum to flip these seats blue -- and if they win, we'll have a Democratic Senate with Vice President Harris as the tie-breaking vote.
**[Our Democratic candidates in Georgia are relying on grassroots supporters like you to fuel their victories on January 5. Will you contribute $5 or any amount right now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201130i_1119&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock have built incredible campaigns -- and after Joe Biden flipped Georgia blue in the presidential race, their chances of winning these Senate seats are better than ever. Thanks to the work of leaders like Stacey Abrams, more voters are able to cast their ballots -- and they are sending a loud and clear message that they want new representation.
Jon and Raphael can win these races -- but it's going to take all of us to help them get there.
**[Let's flip the Senate, Peter. Donate $5 to our Georgia Democrats now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201130i_1119&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201130i_1119&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4488/42ab3cf4/6631a94b/135de150/3092007225/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4488/42ab3cf4/6631a94b/135de151/3092007225/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: You knocked our socks off!
body:
| | Peter, Wow, our team is speechless today. We are incredibly grateful for each of you as you generously and faithfully stand with us to equip and motivate Christians to vote. You are a true testament to this movement that started in 2015 and, more importantly, to God’s goodness as we are obedient to His calling and the specific task to impact the runoff elections in Georgia. Yesterday was #GivingTuesday and you not only met the initial goal of $100,000, you went way beyond and SURPASSED it! Thank you for responding to our urgent call and generously contributing. Because of you, we are better equipped to make a significant impact in Georgia with our three core initiatives of sending postcards to Christian voters, running a powerful and proven digital ad campaign, and blanketing the radio with messages urging Christians to get to the polls. Not only did many of you financially support our Georgia campaign, but in the last week, the response to our call for volunteers has been staggering. **Here is where you knocked our socks off: we initially planned to send 250,000 postcards into Georgia, but when over 5,000 of you across the nation committed to hand-write personalized messages to voters in Georgia, we now have enough volunteers to send 1.3 million postcards before the election. AMAZING!** Your bold response to make a difference in our nation is so inspiring that a significant donor to My Faith Votes has now **doubled the matching grant!** [Through the end of this week, any donation made to My Faith Votes will be doubled up to an additional $50,000 to reach our new goal of $200,000.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=1) Our team is praising God for His blessings and provision in this campaign, and we are praying for wisdom to steward well all that He is providing for the task at hand. Thank you for being a part of My Faith Votes. We are deeply grateful for each of you. Keep praying and keep praising! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=2) P.S. There are still opportunities to help influence the Georgia elections. It’s not too late to partner with us and give your [time](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2wbizW1YH0rx8-mnBumIhyVfANndAD5BWAb1fP7nHXuKvwhR9W3FouMskB1tLxzLf4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=3) and/or [resources](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=4) to our Georgia campaign.
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=5)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201202com01&n=10)

name: Team Hawley
subject: FWD: Holding the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We have a little over a month until we know the winners of the Senate races in Georgia. If we lose these races, [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5bf809350094cd39bd9681ffb1807d1&_e=zNLRfOT20IoW-jUdqX1rlDGVWJDPItwEWJ-1LgcfnDme63Rwq93ZBvFg9jg12eXpvcX95CR8BJexiUA-OxPdmyD4_l83M1IZC95Z6Kb0478Sods6MEr-9ffxjLlbkWKCeISja2hO-8F5EOdllp8u5DgKsIdd52nZuy0Ivss88pry8x-MFYcrf6plLvWPh_OHZDx8TVLuDLzqFzqlRfBj2YHBnct0h12FtOydJhntBFAUnvuWssxIPA7U89n1vA3T1TIJTznLImgy8eV6aPj-ItaYQJz8Y-d8XEzW_DP1xNORH3e0PVVNZuRABgQi3RuNq65WtBhGSjA4TELpVOb7vihgz8YaB_RSY8mhy5QoGUo%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Did you see this email from Josh? The left is raising money like crazy from Silicon Valley and New York liberal elites. **We cannot let them buy the Senate and gain complete control over the laws of our country!**

**We are less than 35 days away from the runoff elections in Georgia — __we need your help NOW.__**
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5bf809350094cd39bd9681ffb1807d1&_e=zNLRfOT20IoW-jUdqX1rlMorAIwULR9aoJspw9jeEvv2AjueVrB79EDga0fV3ERvxhov29m0exTwiWA-aVKJ4850jT90qNUyM8V6RQXnvP6Tu_8Lw5EBxzanq3gwV_BhN2sbhwW-DPgDhilhH5v9ewC4BaFV-CfaRzdWoNPUYE9PoEDw3pxBzH2w4W0FbF8q9biv6JiPVaCbGLcdhId-OZinwM5H4pBtj9QlWKxQfSVFsW4nWR1QHtR7KzvmvA-1RiyL6I2GaxdORpAcLLLKs7O58a9E1obEYPeA1juidCvOttNMtMTlwCDU5ntiT_JX5AkmV1MaGGWtHOajrPFzf3i1NmFz4JdPL6XjwOqpvugBTaWOoRb6BoHrj4DmspTJova8UGIB7a46-rECxq-3XNVyI_xr1cC5qXpQPaMPn1PRp1kLRCObK1dynk3-VC48)
Like Josh said, we are up against an endless flow of cash, but this should not stop us from fighting to preserve American freedom for future generations.

**We have a strong grassroots presence all over our country.**

**We have faced this before, and we have won.**

Every donation made will be split with their two campaigns to ensure both Georgia and the Senate stay **RED**.
[_**Help us Keep the Senate RED! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5bf809350094cd39bd9681ffb1807d1&_e=zNLRfOT20IoW-jUdqX1rlMorAIwULR9aoJspw9jeEvv2AjueVrB79EDga0fV3ERvxhov29m0exTwiWA-aVKJ4850jT90qNUyM8V6RQXnvP6Tu_8Lw5EBxzanq3gwV_BhN2sbhwW-DPgDhilhH5v9ewC4BaFV-CfaRzdWoNPUYE9PoEDw3pxBzH2w4W0FbF8q9biv6JiPVaCbGLcdhId-OZinwM5H4pBtj9QlWKxQfSVDmScNooUId83T4yUHSt88JgZF_0E-47pS-M5cBo0dshkP9JhiAhyn9OoM4YH0RKjuf7auABDj2ENuIFYNui8GDqqlfYZpANZ3FK3XMBNiQYe7g6DtS6X6uFq2PCDimwd5wi73POw06OWV_aCLMyWxM_QzWmJo8Ftq3Vg9_SSehFxnWTeS58qgUH5o_LiO6pitNVpuOI8PtlZV3n5OgR6v)
We are going to continue building momentum in this race for the next _35 days_ , and we want you to be a part of our team. _**Please consider a small donation today.**_

Thank you,

Team Hawley

\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Josh Hawley
Date: December 1st, 2020
Subject: Holding the line

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: Join Me on 12/15 for the Kick-Off of “Break ‘Em Up! Redistributing Economic Power to the People"
body:
I'll be talking with Sen. Bernie Sanders, Rep. David Cicilline, Sara Nelson, Saru Jayaraman, Veena Dubal and More | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bc458444a7d1/announcing-my-new-book-break-em-up-5073324?e=e870238275)
---
| | | |
---
|
Hi Peter,

Mark your calendars! On December 15 at 2pm ET, I’ll be joining Senator Bernie Sanders, the American Economic Liberties Project and People’s Action to kickoff a new virtual event series: **“[Break ‘Em Up! Redistributing Economic Power to the People](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=ac9ba5d2e7&e=e870238275).”**

Borrowing its name from [my new book](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=4f9d9378a9&e=e870238275), the Break ‘Em Up series will explore why growing the anti-monopoly movement is key to achieving economic justice and creating a more stable, inclusive democracy. The kickoff will focus on how we can strengthen worker power by fighting corporate power. It will identify new anti-monopoly opportunities for the progressive movement. And it will be a lot of fun.
---
| [RSVP](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=5b8947a73b&e=e870238275 "RSVP")
---
| You’ll also hear from leading anti-monopolist Congressman David Cicilline; Sara Nelson, International President, Association of Flight Attendants-CWA, AFL-CIO; Saru Jayaraman, President, One Fair Wage and Director of the Food Labor Research Center, University of California, Berkeley; Veena Dubal, Professor of Law, University of California, Hastings; George Goehl, Director, People’s Action; and Sarah Miller and Morgan Harper of the American Economic Liberties Project.

We hope you can join us!

Warmly,

_Zephyr Teachout_
---
| |
---
| | | | _Copyright © 2020 American Economic Liberties Project, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
American Economic Liberties Project1150 Connecticut Ave NW Ste 800Washington, DC 20036-4130
[Add us to your address book](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2&e=e870238275) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2&e=e870238275&c=002662c8ed).

---

Friend,

Have you heard of Joe Biden's absurd gun tax?

He hates the Second Amendment and semiautomatic rifle owners _so much_ that**he would FORCE them to participate in either a gun buyback program or to register their guns under the National Firearms Act, which would require a payment of a $200 tax.**

**Joe Biden wants to make gun control less about firearm ownership and more about controlling freedom loving Americans. **

We can't let Democrats take back control of the Senate. [**Please contribute whatever you can right now so we can put a STOP to the Democrats and PREVENT them from taking away our guns!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HUXSZ4XKkMzk0-tVktcVweJQ8juVY25eEIJOYoz4JPjGjcdc__qKRSgvrbrIC9FFJz0MUHfI5dPv4F4MGTvWlp9zEwgbsGN6CpFPf2ujmO3M_rhEA8yB4vvyoNp1Qf6HsG-csEWwnfmirfo8KCfeBcTR9z38NyaduD5jkfFDZ-lBT7y3hwZoKs4gDPEw6iUsr18U4Q9IjJSWgm4vzY9-ixWuf8dUwul2_itKu31M-uvVeqsiFwQUqXhsyjH1nbkV0BJ6YkfzzIMNrcciyi2tDkyvUmXgHAQv2pBJxiCZdP90RB2HXDCOKKvtOrJAn3VcrU-PGN-h1t2FRIq3qcHcPDspwUZWjJ9g0_bo3zmLjLJYvMWHMJZbB5_xA7V07tsCHLxXqFevR7wkzPEpnw3-Y8THUzA6mLQ1aX8qw91HANA=&c=KUy1srGOtKAknLRUjAlpYbGBqUOvHTAoFN7zeJ1imdtH3Uvh0ObMAQ==&ch=lm6Yd67YtkeT73GL7X3VRoc382S2DIKe8UUIk_Rqwy4t2dvT--jmNQ==)
**[**STAND UP FOR THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HUXSZ4XKkMzk0-tVktcVweJQ8juVY25eEIJOYoz4JPjGjcdc__qKRSgvrbrIC9FFJz0MUHfI5dPv4F4MGTvWlp9zEwgbsGN6CpFPf2ujmO3M_rhEA8yB4vvyoNp1Qf6HsG-csEWwnfmirfo8KCfeBcTR9z38NyaduD5jkfFDZ-lBT7y3hwZoKs4gDPEw6iUsr18U4Q9IjJSWgm4vzY9-ixWuf8dUwul2_itKu31M-uvVeqsiFwQUqXhsyjH1nbkV0BJ6YkfzzIMNrcciyi2tDkyvUmXgHAQv2pBJxiCZdP90RB2HXDCOKKvtOrJAn3VcrU-PGN-h1t2FRIq3qcHcPDspwUZWjJ9g0_bo3zmLjLJYvMWHMJZbB5_xA7V07tsCHLxXqFevR7wkzPEpnw3-Y8THUzA6mLQ1aX8qw91HANA=&c=KUy1srGOtKAknLRUjAlpYbGBqUOvHTAoFN7zeJ1imdtH3Uvh0ObMAQ==&ch=lm6Yd67YtkeT73GL7X3VRoc382S2DIKe8UUIk_Rqwy4t2dvT--jmNQ==)**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_AN0GRTb0mqLgnZ9Vpuj4A8xPWVfeV1ozf9-bV7CLkKCHiO3IXLMIMixQx_rWuZQ-WFI4iv_4_iFLiOTfr34glJHZd3n_PqBnI7qNHKs9MX1fuOHBTwvjhdpDaP2w4V0nd_-nEM6zMs=&c=Ow0j79SabEJgR53X1qKflgPd998o63KiFPSKqOKVL9ROyUhjGfkAXQ==&ch=MXi0uNzw4BfOug5KzeSrzuMKnUghEs8wJXW8-uPto6u1t1A2c8Fjmw==).

name: Tim Scott
subject: These 3 words should TERRIFY YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I'm sure you've received many emails about the importance of keeping the Senate, but it all boils down to three words: Secretary Bernie Sanders. If Joe Biden is certified as the winner, the Senate is our last line of defense to stop Bernie from being confirmed for a cabinet position, and we MUST win the Georgia runoffs to keep it.
Friend,

I'm sure you've received many emails about the importance of keeping the Senate, but it all boils down to three words: **Secretary Bernie Sanders.**
[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/secretary-bernie-sanders/?utm_campaign=20201202_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1042136-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201202_these-3-words-should-terrify-you/)

If Joe Biden is certified as the winner, the Senate is our last line of defense to stop Bernie from being confirmed for a cabinet position, and we MUST win the Georgia runoffs to keep it. It's no secret that Bernie Sanders wants to influence every single decision that Joe Biden makes, but now he's openly campaigning to become the next Labor Secretary.

[STOP BERNIE SANDERS](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/secretary-bernie-sanders/?utm_campaign=20201202_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1042136-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201202_these-3-words-should-terrify-you/)

[**Can you chip in $50, $25, or anything you can to help us keep the Senate?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/secretary-bernie-sanders/?utm_campaign=20201202_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1042136-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201202_these-3-words-should-terrify-you/)

I need your help to keep Bernie Sanders out of the cabinet. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Another email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,
I'm in-between meetings and don't have much time. Here's the situation:

Senate Republicans **MISSED** their November fundraising goal.

The polls in Georgia's critical runoff elections are **NARROWING.**

Democrats are pouring **MILLIONS** into these races to flip the Senate and crown Chuck Schumer as Majority Leader.

We have another shot to pull ahead, though. Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=65aa682851de4e46a24248e3ce2aa510&_e=p9_u0-EhTu0RyFOfyTbpRDbLo9r8kKIK_QZExh1-WP669MgIvep52RZdbZ0M6gFSIYwu-7Nk1FFmg3sfzmv0UlJ3GKzCGJw6CZrKaIZKJxOAItwyoK77529OD6D9G50D8Ek4oIQZNZGQj5UgH5LYAf_I0RZmK-6uq4iE2LuMqXO3_wrRDoOe4a5jfImkyoE9uG4nR4fuNX2OqraJxGaDaQZ7GCkzMWLrLB4vV5yalswShgGJ7LjRUOe7CL5WJmy68ZmzuOah8qFD7jlHeJHSn1-ll9A6cJSgY_-6SO2hPZAG1MCrp_QkNCsP8lyYKOLj8acYhAYcMice_tncG07CRtsAFDJhDeP7OJkusYw2A3TCFyTc0QHQZDC5bRByhv5fcpqUXVDm-BTLx_K1xCp31Dg5EV_JnucuHP28YGHZCjfiOxP5Cqq3sMx65N0h2O2elrVSd2vFkspLGpt2UBtx_DmhJjHoiUDnU36gw5wsa8w%3D) Friend, Election Day is almost a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin **12 vote** lead against Anthony Brindisi. **We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow.** Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to **[defend the integrity of this election outcome.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=65aa682851de4e46a24248e3ce2aa510&_e=p9_u0-EhTu0RyFOfyTbpRDbLo9r8kKIK_QZExh1-WP669MgIvep52RZdbZ0M6gFSIYwu-7Nk1FFmg3sfzmv0UlJ3GKzCGJw6CZrKaIZKJxOAItwyoK77529OD6D9G50D8Ek4oIQZNZGQj5UgH5LYAf_I0RZmK-6uq4iE2LuMqXO3_wrRDoOe4a5jfImkyoE9uG4nR4fuNX2OqraJxGaDaQZ7GCkzMWLrLB4vV5yalswShgGJ7LjRUOe7CL5WJmy68ZmzuOah8qFD7jlHeJHSn2ny-DR4PRoiBTt2JoMgbHrAYCN0Ig_1izD-vRiTpIXVL1hFLfGTqbvA98gcGehulPKE2deXt9D_vKHkBXQDednhXhRakngshpsVDprzJggd2eNnmBSGZoA5DZbn9Z72CqMwyQkriTCmn3RaPvEa8Fh_laQndK3Ci2vOq5cO5_KmD1yh-xS8rzuooxDbG0H74Etnhli-Kqll4SzGIHEwXlI%3D)** Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. **That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late._[Can I count on you to help us finish the fight?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=65aa682851de4e46a24248e3ce2aa510&_e=p9_u0-EhTu0RyFOfyTbpRDbLo9r8kKIK_QZExh1-WP669MgIvep52RZdbZ0M6gFSIYwu-7Nk1FFmg3sfzmv0UlJ3GKzCGJw6CZrKaIZKJxOAItwyoK77529OD6D9G50D8Ek4oIQZNZGQj5UgH5LYAf_I0RZmK-6uq4iE2LuMqXO3_wrRDoOe4a5jfImkyoE9uG4nR4fuNX2OqraJxGaDaQZ7GCkzMWLrLB4vV5yalswShgGJ7LjRUOe7CL5WJmy68ZmzuOah8qFD7jlHeJHSn2Eq0vWKYdeu6jNkihI8UP2rUbYWUt_Acc-0N_tC15wm7lp6FmC8DpUwcrea6njh6r0fi2njngQ9SNJnXlkfMfpATOtzdFfvGiva9TjXtYNf73vWyKKmMEVrkmKbgqQFMFy15omAA7oOOZHq1K1QE8ouidFkedFeokWlgjmRL_lkfrI0d_d19gnvV-nUZNSXiKjPSGj9NfHAMq1pbFT6foQ%3D)_** clean_body: Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment Friend, Election Day is almost a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin 12 vote lead against Anthony Brindisi. We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow. Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: re: my critical race in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The path to a Senate majority runs through Georgia
Hi there -- Because of you, we were able to push our critical race in Georgia into a runoff election. But this race and the fight for Senate control are far from over.
The efforts of thousands of grassroots Democrats -- including you -- have helped send our nation a powerful signal: Georgians are ready to champion our shared future. And right now, the road to flipping the Senate runs through Georgia.
But the GOP has already poured MILLIONS of right-wing dollars into ads attacking me -- and to make things even worse, I'm still $30,000 short of my rapid-response goal to fight back.
What we do -- what you do -- right now will decide Senate control. Senator Hassan said that you know how to fight the tough fights, so she asked me to reach out immediately: [**Will you give $3 or more right now to help me win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc643/2a380d31/21f3f692/f05d90/3217323288/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEyMDJfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20201202_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Winning this race won't be easy. And with Senate control on the line -- Mitch McConnell and the GOP will do and spend everything they can to maintain his stranglehold over the Senate.
I have what it takes to win this race, everyone -- but we're headed for a firestorm battle in Georgia. All eyes are on us -- and I won't be able to do it without you. clean_body: The path to a Senate majority runs through Georgia Hi there -- Because of you, we were able to push our critical race in Georgia into a runoff election. But this race and the fight for Senate control are far from over. The efforts of thousands of grassroots Democrats -- including you -- have helped send our nation a powerful signal: Georgians are ready to champion our shared future. And right now, the road to flipping the Senate runs through Georgia. But the GOP has already poured MILLIONS of right-wing dollars into ads attacking me -- and to make things even worse, I'm still $30,000 short of my rapid-response goal to fight back. What we do -- what you do -- right now will decide Senate control. Senator Hassan said that you know how to fight the tough fights, so she asked me to reach out immediately: "" Winning this race won't be easy. And with Senate control on the line -- Mitch McConnell and the GOP will do and spend everything they can to maintain his stranglehold over the Senate. I have what it takes to win this race, everyone -- but we're headed for a firestorm battle in Georgia. All eyes are on us -- and I won't be able to do it without you. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thank you, Jon ""

Friend,

I know you've probably seen too many emails lately, but I'm reaching out to simply thank you for your unwavering support the past few months.

**As we head into the last weeks of this critical Georgia Runoff election, we must stay focused on what 's really at stake.**

Without grassroots donors like you, Friend, our success is not possible. With your help, we delivered massive victories for our party, winning in states like Iowa, Maine, and North Carolina. But our fight isn't over yet.

With just over one month until this special election with Senate control in the balance, we must remain steadfast in our duty to defend the rights and freedoms that Democrats have already promised to eliminate if they take these seats. We can't back down now.

Once again, thank you for your ardent support.

In Service,
Todd Young

Governor Phil Murphy is persistent in his efforts to shut down New Jersey. Radical ideas such as another statewide shutdown infringe on our Constitutional Rights and makes it harder for our families to make ends meet.
_**Friend, we need your help to stop Governor Murphy from shutting down New Jersey ... AGAIN!**_

Phil Murphy is abusing his power by pushing a statewide shutdown that will harm even more small businesses across South Jersey. Up to one-third of New Jersey's small businesses have already closed because of Murphy's abuse of executive power. **We can 't let any more shut down and ruin the lives of thousands of hard-working middle class South Jersey families. **
Republican Congressman Jeff Van Drew is standing up to Phil Murphy and the Radical Left to keep New Jersey _open_.
Join Team Van Drew in standing up to Governor Murphy by signing our petition to let him know that we are ready to fight for our Constitutional Rights!

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Investing in Providence
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
These days, I'm often the bearer of bad news and hard truths. Today, however, I'm excited to share some good news that we've been working on since long before any of us heard the word COVID-19. I'm excited to share that Rhode Island has been awarded an $8 million grant to pilot community-based initiatives in zip codes 02908 and 02909 in Central Providence. We're calling this the Central Providence Opportunities initiative. We'll be working with the Rhode Island Foundation and ONE Neighborhood Builders to implement this work.
Earlier today, I was joined by community partners to discuss this initiative. You can click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEYgmMDmOD2d16PvJhFHU1qCKR0c-z95nxyJmr-9LcUNon4vDA3mYr8hKIeCppR3zNtfwsUlyVKyg1p_2AzUO2P62z-ITRz8r5x7gnmt61r1_-YzMffPZ7tA8XKL6Hrq76pj-sVgWKpCszBsMN8ajeUnMkXaQ5S-FMjGKEbgOe8_QJwZy76KNNVMSR3KjsSdnwgTccC6iJpkOL78NhFwnpmbzWOqZVDx&c=kV3SoMMl7xU5JJlINmhJRZoj9E68zypBQFNZou4J95pdT6y7l4KHbg==&ch=fudBJtvbskFQH6hYCkBo4dWlcZQY7nPlD3yanqicvJxDzjd0CVtrzQ==) to watch the video.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEYgmMDmOD2d16PvJhFHU1qCKR0c-z95nxyJmr-9LcUNon4vDA3mYr8hKIeCppR3zNtfwsUlyVKyg1p_2AzUO2P62z-ITRz8r5x7gnmt61r1_-YzMffPZ7tA8XKL6Hrq76pj-sVgWKpCszBsMN8ajeUnMkXaQ5S-FMjGKEbgOe8_QJwZy76KNNVMSR3KjsSdnwgTccC6iJpkOL78NhFwnpmbzWOqZVDx&c=kV3SoMMl7xU5JJlINmhJRZoj9E68zypBQFNZou4J95pdT6y7l4KHbg==&ch=fudBJtvbskFQH6hYCkBo4dWlcZQY7nPlD3yanqicvJxDzjd0CVtrzQ==)
---
| This initiative will improve economic opportunities for the residents of these zip codes through four core strategies. We are going to ensure residents have quality, affordable housing, we are going to expand access to childcare and Pre-K, we are going to foster economic stability through apprenticeship programs and small business supports, and we are going to do it all by investing in existing community organizations that are already on the ground doing this work.
Our announcement today isn't just about 02909 and 02908. This work will be a model for the type of change we want to see across the state. Once we know how to make the biggest impact, we'll scale the most successful policies and programs statewide. The COVID-19 pandemic has shone a light on the long-standing disparities--across income, race and ethnicity--that persist in our state and our country. 02908 and 02909 have some of the highest COVID case rates in Rhode Island, due in part to the structural inequalities this initiative will seek to address.
We aren't working to get back to where we started before COVID-19. We're building a new Rhode Island that is more equitable and more resilient -- an economy that provides opportunities for all. I hope you're as excited about this initiative as we are.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEYgmMDmOD2d16PvJhFHU1qCKR0c-z95nxyJmr-9LcUNon4vDA3mYr8hKIeCppR3BWEP3PFOvVbVo9jFy_nU1tDE4XNMn4lgwqi7W8IHxUZmIe1fHYOMV2oe-syOZs1R3kJivVMGRQr-zXaDer_M9Py_Jeul5ti5YCFT4xeE3XZNQIJyOVI4v5EUsIA-8FNNX7WBf8RdnbWUHOwmSbBGmZOSUV_6j7ei1m9CNnOXHZ-Liv8LK7OfOEBZSuoZURRFLrldcE8PylojN-DKLEO_0E8neKSAooKHazV3Y8vPsKI-iPTsft-GZ_-Rx7DkhCm9Tnbf8Al418U=&c=kV3SoMMl7xU5JJlINmhJRZoj9E68zypBQFNZou4J95pdT6y7l4KHbg==&ch=fudBJtvbskFQH6hYCkBo4dWlcZQY7nPlD3yanqicvJxDzjd0CVtrzQ==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEYgmMDmOD2d16PvJhFHU1qCKR0c-z95nxyJmr-9LcUNon4vDA3mYnnAublaKHe7yrCBM-Ma4S7UKMb_kP2CbsCmt9R5b6J6t_nFz2XfqwDKvI6tFV6YJdfLLI2NRLMm6zBzyAqaXoSf57mpISdBrKwJ__KzGioPKRTc44akbzFxDnq61zjmSYrh3SdoUc-AJDZP2dVIPHg=&c=kV3SoMMl7xU5JJlINmhJRZoj9E68zypBQFNZou4J95pdT6y7l4KHbg==&ch=fudBJtvbskFQH6hYCkBo4dWlcZQY7nPlD3yanqicvJxDzjd0CVtrzQ==)
---

body:
In New Jersey, there is a corrupt bi-partisan establishment made up of Democrats and Never-Trump Republicans... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us15.campaign-archive.com/?e=3e017fab0f&u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2a503948e5)

---
| | Dear Friend,
The News Media has failed the American People completely. While we wait to see what happens with President Trump, know this: The National polls, all of them, including the few ‘prominent’ ones in New Jersey were 100% wrong. Republicans won EVERY SINGLE toss up congressional seat Nationwide. We did not lose a single State Legislature, we have protected the Senate majority, and it looks like we have given the Democrats the smallest majority in the House of Representatives in decades!
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8d3aff7db0&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| While most of the national news is very good, there is a big local problem right here in New Jersey. Unlike the rest of the country, New Jersey lost 10 out of 12 congressional seats. What happened? If you listen to the lying dishonest media, they will say some nonsense like minorities don’t like President Trump. That is a lie. Looking at Florida’s numbers prove every single minority demographic and women flocked to vote for President Trump in record numbers. In New Jersey, being the most diverse state in the nation, the very same results are possible but there is a corrupt bi-partisan establishment made up of Democrats and Never-Trump Republicans that stands in the way. These corrupt individuals orchestrated New Jersey's losses to fit the News Media created "anti-Trump narrative" and it is time to throw these corrupt individuals out of New Jersey politics once and for all. I delve into it in my speech below from the #StopTheSteal rally in Bedminster. Listen to it:
---
| [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=d4f16f3e39&e=3e017fab0f)
---

---
| The unholy alliance between corrupt Never-Trump Republicans (RINO’s) and Democrats that sacrificed our US Senate and Congressional seats must be destroyed. [**I need your help**](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8cec1f6fd9&e=3e017fab0f) to fix our Election Integrity which has been all but destroyed. I need your help to [_Stop Tyrannical Phil Murphy_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=99bbce28e0&e=3e017fab0f), who has bankrupted 31% of New Jersey businesses that will not open after this pandemic. [_I need you help_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=bdace381de&e=3e017fab0f) to remove the Corrupt RINO’s that have betrayed Republicans and orchestrated our state-wide losses. [_I need your help_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b6bb3cd4ca&e=3e017fab0f) to re-open New Jersey. I have been fighting non-stop since 2017 and I am dedicated to ensure the People of New Jersey Win. Also, one more update...[our US Supreme Court Case against Phil Murphy’s unconstitutional election and illegal vote-by-mail scheme](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=eb0f71e854&e=3e017fab0f) has been distributed to all the Justices and we hope to hear good news soon. If we win our US Supreme Court Case, President Trump will win his as well.
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor
New Jersey Deserves Justice

While we wait to see what happens with President Trump, know this: The National polls, all of them, including the few ‘prominent’ ones in New Jersey were 100% wrong. Republicans won EVERY SINGLE toss up congressional seat Nationwide. We did not lose a single State Legislature, we have protected the Senate majority, and it looks like we have given the Democrats the smallest majority in the House of Representatives in decades! | "CONTRIBUTE" | While most of the national news is very good, there is a big local problem right here in New Jersey. Unlike the rest of the country, New Jersey lost 10 out of 12 congressional seats. What happened? If you listen to the lying dishonest media, they will say some nonsense like minorities don’t like President Trump. That is a lie. Looking at Florida’s numbers prove every single minority demographic and women flocked to vote for President Trump in record numbers. In New Jersey, being the most diverse state in the nation, the very same results are possible but there is a corrupt bi-partisan establishment made up of Democrats and Never-Trump Republicans that stands in the way. These corrupt individuals orchestrated New Jersey's losses to fit the News Media created "anti-Trump narrative" and it is time to throw these corrupt individuals out of New Jersey politics once and for all. I delve into it in my speech below from the #StopTheSteal rally in Bedminster. Listen to it: | | "CONTRIBUTE" | The unholy alliance between corrupt Never-Trump Republicans (RINO’s) and Democrats that sacrificed our US Senate and Congressional seats must be destroyed. to fix our Election Integrity which has been all but destroyed. I need your help to , who has bankrupted 31% of New Jersey businesses that will not open after this pandemic. to remove the Corrupt RINO’s that have betrayed Republicans and orchestrated our state-wide losses. to re-open New Jersey. I have been fighting non-stop since 2017 and I am dedicated to ensure the People of New Jersey Win. Also, one more update... has been distributed to all the Justices and we hope to hear good news soon. If we win our US Supreme Court Case, President Trump will win his as well. | Sincerely, Hirsh V.
